_meta.comment: Stub corpus for v1.0.0. Phase 2a (iOS migration) sweeps every view and adds the remaining ~110 keys. Phase 2b adds compact-form variants for Dynamic Type. New keys are additive — existing keys cannot change shape without a major version bump.
